author: Andrea Grandi
description: Sync meeting transcripts, notes, and AI summaries from MacParakeet and Fellow into your vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Andrea Grandi
manifest.description: Sync meeting transcripts, notes, and AI summaries from MacParakeet and Fellow into your vault.
manifest.name: Meeting Notes Sync

name: Meeting Notes Sync

releases.description:

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-meeting-notes-sync/compare/0.4.1...0.4.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Rename plugin to Meeting Notes Sync (M6, #23) by @andreagrandi in https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-meeting-notes-sync/pull/32
* Multi-source state: source bindings, canonical interval, v1 migration (#27) by @andreagrandi in https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-meeting-notes-sync/pull/33
* Identity resolution: cross-source merge by interval overlap (#28) by @andreagrandi in https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-meeting-notes-sync/pull/34
* docs: Fellow API spike findings (closes #24) by @andreagrandi in https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-meeting-notes-sync/pull/35
* v2 multi-source: Fellow integration, merge rendering, dated folders (0.2.0) by @andreagrandi in https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-meeting-notes-sync/pull/36


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-meeting-notes-sync/compare/0.1.0...0.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Scaffold: loadable plugin skeleton with build, tests, and toolchain by @andreagrandi in https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-macparakeet-sync/pull/13
* CI: GitHub Actions workflow running build and tests by @andreagrandi in https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-macparakeet-sync/pull/14
* Add Dependabot config for npm and GitHub Actions by @andreagrandi in https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-macparakeet-sync/pull/15
* CLI bridge: discover macparakeet-cli and add a Check connection command by @andreagrandi in https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-macparakeet-sync/pull/22
* Bump actions/setup-node from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-macparakeet-sync/pull/16
* Bump actions/checkout from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-macparakeet-sync/pull/17
* Bump esbuild from 0.25.5 to 0.28.1 in the minor-and-patch group by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-macparakeet-sync/pull/18
* Bump @types/node from 22.19.21 to 25.9.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-macparakeet-sync/pull/19
* Bump vitest from 3.2.6 to 4.1.8 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-macparakeet-sync/pull/21
* Bump typescript from 5.9.3 to 6.0.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-macparakeet-sync/pull/20

## New Contributors
* @andreagrandi made their first contribution in https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-macparakeet-sync/pull/13
* @dependabot[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-macparakeet-sync/pull/16

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/andreagrandi/obsidian-macparakeet-sync/commits/0.1.0
